description: Catalog of Common Paper standard legal agreement templates (Markdown) collected in the templates/ directory. Each template is a modifiable legal agreement the prelegal system can adapt for the user.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Cover Page
templates.description: Fillable cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Captures party details and negotiable options and incorporates the Mutual NDA Standard Terms.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Standard Terms
templates.description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA, letting each party disclose and protect confidential information for a defined purpose.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Terms for providing access to and use of a cloud (SaaS) service, including subscriptions, support, and order forms.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Terms for an early-access design partner program in which a partner uses a pre-release product and provides feedback.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Uptime commitments, availability calculations, and remedies for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Terms for delivering professional services under statements of work (SOWs).

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Data protection terms governing the processing of personal data, defining processor and subprocessor relationships.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: License terms for installing and using software on customer-controlled systems for permitted uses.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Mutual cooperation terms setting out each party's obligations in a business partnership.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Trial and evaluation terms allowing a customer to access a product for evaluation purposes during a pilot period.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA business associate terms governing the use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI).

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum governing the use of AI services and features, covering input/output, restrictions, and responsibilities.
